title: Notification opt-out enforcement (negative pack WF-013-NEG-004)
business_reason: A contact that has opted out of a channel must never be delivered to. The fan-out now drops opted-out recipients before creating the batch.

design.filter: fanout.ts contactHash(address) (sha256 of normalized address) + PURE filterOptedOut(recipients, optedOutHashes). Unit-tested (4).
design.wiring: fanoutEvent loads notification_preferences where channel=<batch channel> AND is_enabled=false, builds a Set of opted-out contact hashes, and removes matching recipients before the batch + recipient insert. The audit + result report the suppressed count; the batch never contains an opted-out recipient.

param_14.question: Are opt-outs respected on bulk sends?
param_14.answer: Yes. Before a notification batch is created, fan-out removes any recipient whose contact has opted out of that channel (a notification_preferences row with is_enabled=false). Opted-out contacts are never added to the batch; the suppressed count is recorded and audited.
param_14.security_implications: consent honored; opted-out contacts cannot be reached even by a templated send; suppression is auditable.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: per-event-group opt-out granularity; a self-serve preference UI; double-opt-in.
